name: @minsky/human-loop
description: Human↔agent QA channel via an append-only Markdown file at `.minsky/qa-log.md`. Agents write `## Q:` blocks and wait for the human to append `## A:` blocks; the human edits the file in any editor. This package ships only the pure parser/serializer (slice 1 of P0 `minsky-human-comm-via-file`); the async askHuman() + fs.watch + lockfile layers ship in subsequent slices.
